news.t: How Fidelity's Disruptive Thematic ETFs Suite Breaks the Mold

holdings.infoBox: FBOT is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are Teradyne stock at 6.96%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.71%, NVIDIA at 4.75%, Deere & Company at 4.65%, and THK Co., Ltd. at 3.53%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Disruptive Automation ETF (FBOT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in innovative businesses thought to have potentially provide disruption to the marketplace. The fund holds global disruptive automation companies, from industrial robotics to autonomous driving and AI. FBOT was launched on Apr 16, 2020 and is issued by Fidelity.
